channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.0

  • Live streaming transcription — Watch words appear in real time as the AI transcribes your audio
  • Segment timeline view — Switch between Text and Timeline tabs to see timestamped segments with confidence indicators
  • Confidence highlighting — Low-confidence words appear lighter so you can spot uncertain transcriptions at a glance
  • Export to multiple formats — Export your transcription as TXT, SRT, WebVTT, or JSON with word-level timing data
  • Search transcriptions — Find specific words or phrases across both text and timeline views
  • Improved animations — New waveform animation while transcribing with real-time status updates
